message:
feat: add using-chrome-directly plugin to marketplace

BETA: VERY LIGHTLY TESTED

New plugin for direct Chrome browser control via DevTools Protocol.

Features:
- Zero dependencies (built-in WebSocket)
- Tab index syntax for simplicity
- Platform-agnostic chrome-ws start command
- 17 commands covering browser automation
- Designed for AI agents (especially Haiku 3)

Version: 1.0.0
Repository: https://github.com/obra/superpower-using-chrome-directly
